inject_entries.hint: When enabled, the full log block (tag, header, entries, inner footer) is injected. When disabled, only the outer footer text is injected.

tag_name.hint: The tag name that wraps the injected recursion log. Any characters except < > and line breaks are allowed.

header_text.hint: Explanatory text displayed inside the tag, before the numbered entries. Supports \n for line breaks.
header_text.default: The following are curated snapshots from previous conversation windows — each one manually selected and preserved by Felis Abyssalis. They are ordered from most recent to oldest. Carry them forward.

display_count.hint: How many of the most recent entries to inject when a new conversation window opens.

inject_position.hint: Where to inject the recursion log in the LLM request. user_message_before: before the user's message; user_message_after: after the user's message; system_prompt: appended to the system prompt.

date_format.hint: How timestamps are displayed in the injected log. MM-DD for month-day, YYYY-MM-DD for full date.

inner_footer_text.hint: Text displayed inside the tag, after the last entry and before the closing tag. Supports \n for line breaks.

footer_text.hint: Text displayed after the closing tag. Placed directly before Felis Abyssalis's live message. Supports \n for line breaks.
footer_text.default: Below is Felis Abyssalis's live message. Execute from here.

initial_context_count.hint: Number of context entries already present when a new window opens (from preset conversations). Set to 0 if no preset; set to 2 if one user+assistant preset pair exists. Injection fires when actual context count <= this value.
